briefing: Markets posted a flat-to-slightly-negative session to open Q3, with NASDAQ -0.3% and S&P 500 unchanged — classic neutral, no directional conviction. Despite having $577 in cash and 4 open slots, the top candidates (RGC, OSCR) score high on RSI and MACD but lack the volume surge signal that would confirm institutional participation. Strategy playbook is clear: don't force buys on neutral days without all four confirmations — hold cash and wait for the next genuine risk-on setup.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash discipline means resisting the urge to deploy capital just because you have it available. On neutral or directionless market days, holding cash preserves buying power for high-conviction setups — where all your entry signals align — rather than tying up funds in positions entered at suboptimal timing.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 資金紀律是指抵制僅因手握現金便急於入市的衝動。在市場方向不明的日子保留現金，能為高確信度的入場機會保存彈藥——即所有入市訊號同步確認之時——避免在時機欠佳時建倉，白白消耗寶貴的子彈。

market_education.summary_en: Today marked the first trading session of Q3 2026, with markets treading water as investors repositioned after a strong June. The NASDAQ's mild dip reflected light profit-taking in tech following recent momentum, while the broader S&P 500 held flat on balanced buying and selling. With no major economic releases today, volume was subdued and price action lacked the conviction needed for new entries.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日為2026年第三季首個交易日，市場在經歷強勁六月後進入觀望整固階段。納斯達克指數小幅下跌，反映科技股近期升勢後出現溫和獲利回吐，而標普500指數則在買賣力量平衡下維持平盤。由於今日無重大經濟數據公布，成交量偏低，價格走勢欠缺方向性，不具備新倉入市的條件。
